guide_voice_scene2_desc: Combine with voice input for a full voice conversation experience. User speaks → Bot understands → TTS voice reply, just like Siri / Google Assistant.
guide_voice_scene3_desc: Visually impaired users can receive all Bot replies via voice. Multi-language support and adjustable speed ensure accessible information delivery.
guide_voice_scene4_desc: Supports Traditional Chinese / English / Japanese / Korean / Thai and more. Ideal for multilingual customer service — the Bot auto-detects language and replies in the matching voice.
guide_voice_example_desc: An OpenClaw Bot triggers voice while replying to a user:
guide_voice_feat1: 📱 Background Playback: Voice plays even when the App is in the background or screen is locked (Foreground Service)
guide_voice_feat2: 🔔 FCM Fallback: Falls back to Firebase Cloud Messaging when Socket.IO disconnects
guide_voice_feat3: 🌐 Multi-Language: Supports all languages available on the Android TextToSpeech engine
guide_voice_feat4: ⚡ Low Latency: Typically less than 1 second from Bot call to user hearing the voice
guide_voice_feat5: 🎛️ Adjustable Parameters: Speed and pitch are fully customizable (0.5x–2.0x)
guide_voice_note: 💡 Note: TTS currently supports Android devices only. iOS support is planned. Text limit is 500 characters; for longer text, split into multiple calls.
guide_voice_cta_api: API Docs: Full API Skill Doc
guide_voice_cta_app: Android App: Download on Google Play
rn_hero_subtitle: What's new in E-Claw — features, improvements, and fixes across the platform.
